name: McCluskey
description: Three rounds of an ascending gymnastics ladder — 9 muscle-ups, 15 burpee pull-ups, and 21 pull-ups — each round closing with an 800m run.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/mccluskey (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-09; official Rx adds an optional 20 lb vest or body armor if available
